children.name: Storybook best practices for making the most out of Nx

pkg.name: playwright
pkg.description: The Nx Plugin for Playwright contains executors and generators allowing your workspace to use the powerful Playwright integration testing capabilities.

/nx-api/playwright/documents/overview.name: Overview
/nx-api/playwright/documents/overview.description: The Nx Plugin for Playwright contains executors and generators allowing your workspace to use the powerful Playwright integration testing capabilities.

/nx-api/playwright/generators/configurat.description: Add Nx Playwright configuration to your project
/nx-api/playwright/generators/configurat.name: configuration

/nx-api/playwright/generators/init.description: Initializes a Playwright project in the current workspace
/nx-api/playwright/generators/init.name: init

/nx-api/playwright/generators/convert-to.description: Convert existing Playwright project(s) using `@nx/playwright:playwright` executor to use `@nx/playwright/plugin`.
/nx-api/playwright/generators/convert-to.name: convert-to-inferred

/nx-api/playwright/migrations/update-19-.description: Add inferred ciTargetNames to targetDefaults with dependsOn to ensure dependent application builds are scheduled before atomized tasks.
/nx-api/playwright/migrations/update-19-.name: update-19-6-0-add-e2e-ci-target-defaults

/nx-api/playwright/migrations/19-6-0-use.description: Use serve-static or preview for webServerCommand.
/nx-api/playwright/migrations/19-6-0-use.name: 19-6-0-use-serve-static-preview-for-command

/nx-api/playwright/migrations/18-1-0-rem.description: Remove invalid baseUrl option from @nx/playwright:playwright targets in project.json.
/nx-api/playwright/migrations/18-1-0-rem.name: 18-1-0-remove-baseUrl-from-project-json

/nx-api/playwright/migrations/17-3-1-add.description: Add project property to playwright config
/nx-api/playwright/migrations/17-3-1-add.name: 17-3-1-add-project-to-config
